violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. No food safety manager was present during time of inspection. Establishment must train additional employees as Food Safety Managers. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine is to be cleaned and sanitized before establishment is to resume use. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The lid on the ice machine is not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the one door low boy. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/28/2024

The floor in the back dish washing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor in the back dish area must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2023

Spoons were observed stored on Stant water at 72 degrees F. without any sanitizer. Water was change for sanitizer (water) at the time of the inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2023
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 08/09/2023
The floor in the ice machine, 3 bay sink area is in poor repair needs to be re-sealed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/09/2023
